name: Ashwake Harbor Lane
feel: The lane narrows and expands with cooling windows, soot visibility, and public-way clearances around export and repair cycles.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Ashwake Harbor Lane is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
